# Continue: place Y, O in red slots 2, 4; N, p in green; b, M in blue; then SPACE
# Red slot 2 center: (23, 32), Red slot 4 center: (23, 44)
# Green slot 0 center: (35, 20), Green slot 1 center: (35, 28)
# Blue slot 0 center: (35, 38), Blue slot 1 center: (35, 46)
# Palette: O(58,10), N(58,18), p(58,25), Y(58,32), b(58,39), M(58,46)

action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 32},  # select Y
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 23, 'col': 32},  # place Y in red slot 2
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 10},  # select O

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 18},  # select N

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 25},  # select p
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 28},  # place p in green slot 1
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 39},  # select b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 38},  # place b in blue slot 0
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 46},  # select M
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 46},  # place M in blue slot 1
    {'action': 'SPACE'}  # validate
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
